title: coleus adenanthus
intro: Coleus adenanthus, also known as Coleus, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly referred to as the coleus or painted nettle. The medicinal properties of Coleus adenanthus include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like rosmarinic acid and flavonoids. The health benefits of Coleus adenanthus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Coleus adenanthus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
